# Glenn's Plumbing

> Licensed NYC Master Plumber offering 24/7 emergency plumbing, drain cleaning, water heater and boiler service across Manhattan, Queens, Bronx and Brooklyn — with upfront flat-rate pricing and a 12-month workmanship guarantee.

Glenn's Plumbing (legal name: Glenn's Plumbing Services, Inc.) is owned by David Glenn, a licensed NYC Master Plumber (License #1927), bonded and insured. The business has served 2,000+ NYC homes and holds a 4.9-star reputation.

- Phone: (646) 963-2616 (answered 24/7)
- Address: 342 W 71st St, New York, NY 10023
- Email: info@gpsnyc.org
- Hours: 24/7 — nights, weekends and holidays
- Pricing model: upfront flat-rate (approved before work starts, no hourly meter)
- Guarantee: 12-month workmanship guarantee

## Services
- [Plumbing Repair](https://glennph.com/services/plumbing-repair): Leaks, fixtures and toilets fixed right. Starting from $350.
- [Pipe, Leak & Sump Pump](https://glennph.com/services/pipe-leak-sump-pump): Stop drips and basement floods. Starting from $350.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://glennph.com/services/drain-cleaning): Flat-rate drain clearing, no hourly meter. Starting from $375.
- [Water Heater Installation](https://glennph.com/services/water-heater-installation): Same-day hot water, old unit hauled away free. Starting from $3,000.
- [Heating & HVAC](https://glennph.com/services/heating-hvac): Cold rooms and gas safety handled. Starting from $350.
- [Boiler Maintenance](https://glennph.com/services/boiler-maintenance): Prevent costly winter emergencies. Starting from $350.
